Key motivation: this error wasted precious 10 min of my life
When import sgl_kernel fails, I got this:
[sgl_kernel] CRITICAL: Could not load any common_ops library!

Attempted locations:
1. Architecture-specific pattern: /root/sglang/.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages/sgl_kernel/sm90/com

sglang.title: Skip TestLlama4LoRA in CI
sglang.author: lifuhuang
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Skip tests in CI to reduce execution time.

Motivation
This test is very expensive (8-GPU) but it does not have significant value as no real LoRA adapter is loaded.
Skipping it in CI for now, later we can consider add a more proper llama4 test with smaller # of GPUs (e.g., 4)
Modifications

Accuracy

sglang.title: Fix Illegal Instruction/IMA errors when using DP attention -- num_tokens_for_logprob calculation
sglang.author: YAMY1234
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Finding the root fix for #12052
Issue: When running with --enable-dp-attention, the DP gather operation in logits stage uses incorrect metadata, causing Triton kernel to access out-of-bounds memory.
AssertionError: src OOB: sz=661, chunk_size=7168, required=4738048, src.numel=21504

Root

sglang.title: [router] MCP Manager - Support Connection Pooling, Tool Inventory and Proxy
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR refactors the MCP (Model Context Protocol) manager from a complex hierarchical architecture to a simplified flat structure with connection pooling, TTL-based caching, and non-blocking startup. The changes address critical performance, correctness, and reliability issues while maintai

sglang.title: [NVIDIA] Change default quant method for model_opt
sglang.author: kaixih
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
While working on Qwen + Eagle, I found it’s not compatible with NVIDIA’s released Eagle heads (nvidia/Qwen3-235B-A22B-Eagle3). The root cause is that we default quant_method to fp8 for ModelOpt checkpoints, but this assumption doesn’t hold, for example, this model doesn’t specify any quan

sglang.title: [router] cleaned up all the redundant comments in the config module
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary of Changes
types.rs

Removed field comments that simply restated the field names (e.g., "Server host address" above host)
Kept meaningful comments that explain constraints or special behavior (e.g., "Set to -1 to disable rate limiting")

builder.rs

Removed doc comments from builder methods

sglang.title: Clean up attention backend selection code & Other minor rename
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
move the default attention backend selection logic from model_runner.py to server_args.py, so we can put all attention backend related things into a single place
rename spec_num_total_accepted_tokens -> spec_num_accepted_tokens , cum_spec_accept_length -> spec_total_num_accepted_tokens
